scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/db && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build:api: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push:ci -w packages/db && npm run build -w packages/db && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.build:webhooks: npm run db:generate && npm run build -w packages/db && npm run build -w apps/webhooks
scripts.dist:desktop:win: npm run build:web && npm run build:desktop && cd apps/desktop && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:desktop:mac: npm run build:web && npm run build:desktop && cd apps/desktop && electron-builder --mac
